Vendor Details

@if(vendor){

🏢 Company Information

Company Name: {{ vendor.companyName }}

Category: {{ vendor.category }}

Company Registration: {{ vendor.companyRegistrationNumber || '-' }}

👤 Contact Information

Contact Person: {{ vendor.contactPerson }}

Designation: {{ vendor.designation || '-' }}

Email: {{ vendor.email }}

Phone: {{ vendor.phone }}

Alternate Phone: {{ vendor.alternatePhone || '-' }}

🧾 Tax Information

GST Number: {{ vendor.gst }}

PAN Number: {{ vendor.pan || '-' }}

📍 Address Information

Address Line 1: {{ vendor.addressLine1 || '-' }}

Address Line 2: {{ vendor.addressLine2 || '-' }}

City: {{ vendor.city || '-' }}

State: {{ vendor.state || '-' }}

Country: {{ vendor.country || '-' }}

Pincode: {{ vendor.pincode || '-' }}

🌐 Business Information

Website: {{ vendor.website || '-' }}

Description: {{ vendor.description || '-' }}

🏦 Banking Information

Bank Account: {{ vendor.bankAccountNumber || '-' }}

IFSC Code: {{ vendor.ifscCode || '-' }}

Payment Terms: {{ vendor.paymentTerms || '-' }}

📊 Vendor Status

Status: {{ vendor.status }}

Approval Status: {{ vendor.approvalStatus }}

} @else {

Vendor not found.

}
